# Comment by @solar-flare99

**Date:** 2026-04-06T15:56:42Z

---

> I made a very easy to setup of this wiki for yourself using Obsidian and Karpathy's gist. All you need is one config : obsidian vault path and ingest it in your agent and let it organise your claude history just point `setup.md` to your agent
> 
> Check it here : https://github.com/Ar9av/obsidian-wiki
> 
> It created the following based off my .claude and .antigravity folders <img alt="image" width="1578" height="1290" src="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/29639685/574047051-216280fc-79ea-4079-9373-09fc454b53f0.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..NuotHZAjBX-48ayXPKEY0C9LpUGLWbH7TemY0BPyd84">

Thanks! I just used your repo to set up my claude
